'''âk-r-f-y''' ('''kakarfeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wollop|wollop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-r-f-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wollop|wollop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-r-f-y
|-
! Lemma
| kakarfeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikarfeyoko|thikarfeyoko]] || [[word:jikarfeyoko|jikarfeyoko]] || [[word:shikarfeyoko|shikarfeyoko]] || [[word:kikarfeyoko|kikarfeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukarfeyoko|thuthukarfeyoko]] || [[word:jujukarfeyoko|jujukarfeyoko]] || [[word:shushukarfeyoko|shushukarfeyoko]] || [[word:kukukarfeyoko|kukukarfeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokarfeyoko|thokarfeyoko]] || [[word:jokarfeyoko|jokarfeyoko]] || [[word:shokarfeyoko|shokarfeyoko]] || [[word:kokarfeyoko|kokarfeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkarfeyoko|thĂŠkarfeyoko]] || [[word:jĂŠkarfeyoko|jĂŠkarfeyoko]] || [[word:shĂŠkarfeyoko|shĂŠkarfeyoko]] || [[word:kĂŠkarfeyoko|kĂŠkarfeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
